none.justification: It correctly identifies that the real scan-trigger logic lives in driver_nl80211_scan.c and lists the substantive failure paths, but it does not explicitly identify driver_nl80211_scan2 as the sole in-scope function in driver_nl80211.c or state that it has zero local error conditions. Extra sched-scan material is out of scope.

ccodegraph.justification: It directly respects the file-scope trap: driver_nl80211.c has only driver_nl80211_scan2, an ops-table forwarding wrapper with no local error construction. It then clearly labels the real failure paths as living in driver_nl80211_scan.c.

lsp.justification: It explicitly shows driver_nl80211_scan2 in driver_nl80211.c as a thin wrapper and distinguishes that from the actual failure construction in driver_nl80211_scan.c. The listed error conditions match the GT, with extra scheduled-scan context kept separate.
